summary: CRITICAL: Workflow references non-existent tests/matrix.test.ts (line 24) and fixtures/input.json (line 16). Task explicitly requires TDD and 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT'—no test files provided. Source code (matrix.ts, cli.ts) is well-typed with proper error handling, but deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Workflow will fail immediately on test step.
